messages.content: Does EcoBrew support grind control?

Based on the verified product details, the EcoBrew Smart Coffee Maker features precision brewing, 20 profiles, and customizable coffee-to-water ratios. Grind control is not listed among the supported functions.
Quick question: what temperature range does EcoBrew brew at?
EcoBrew brews within a precision range of 88°C to 96°C across its 20 brew profiles.
When was Verdant Home Appliances founded?
Verdant Home Appliances was founded in 2020.
How many brew profiles does EcoBrew offer?
The EcoBrew Smart Coffee Maker offers 20 distinct brew profiles.
Does EcoBrew support grind control?
Yes, each of EcoBrew's 20 brew profiles pairs a temperature setting with grind control.
What company philosophy drives EcoBrew's product design?
Verdant Home Appliances designs EcoBrew around sustainability tracking and closed-loop feedback to minimize waste over the machine's life.
Quick question: what is closed-loop feedback learning on EcoBrew?
Closed-loop feedback learning lets EcoBrew adjust future brews automatically based on your ratings of past brews.
when does it tell me to do maintenance?
EcoBrew sends an auto maintenance alert after every 100 brews or every 3 months, whichever comes first.
How often should I run the cleaning cycle?

The EcoBrew Smart Coffee Maker features auto maintenance alerts to assist with upkeep. These alerts will notify you when cleaning or maintenance is due. Please utilize the unit's integrated feedback system for guidance.
Could you tell me what temperature range does EcoBrew brew at?
EcoBrew brews within a precision range of 88°C to 96°C across its 20 brew profiles.
What's the difference between the stronger and weaker ratio settings?
The standard coffee-to-water ratio is 1:17. To achieve a stronger flavor profile, you can use the 1:15 ratio. Conversely, the 1:18 ratio provides a weaker brew.
What is the standard coffee-to-water ratio on EcoBrew?
The standard coffee-to-water ratio for the EcoBrew is 1:17. For a stronger brew, you can use 1:15, and for a weaker brew, use 1:18.
Where is EcoBrew's parent company headquartered?
EcoBrew is made by Verdant Home Appliances, headquartered in Portland, Oregon.
What temperature range does EcoBrew brew at?
The EcoBrew Smart Coffee Maker utilizes precision brewing within a temperature range of 88–96°C.
Quick question: what is the standard coffee-to-water ratio on EcoBrew?
The standard coffee-to-water ratio is 1:17; stronger is 1:15, weaker is 1:18.
Quick question: what company philosophy drives EcoBrew's product design?
Verdant Home Appliances designs EcoBrew around sustainability tracking and closed-loop feedback to minimize waste over the machine's life.
Why might my EcoBrew brew come out too slowly?
A slow brew is usually a sign of mineral buildup — run a descale cycle with a citric-acid solution.
